steps.title: Condition for no solution
steps.content:
• For a linear equation $$ax = c$$, there is no solution when the coefficient of $$x$$ is zero and the constant term is non-zero: $$a = 0$$ and $$c \neq 0$$.
  • Here $$a = b-2$$ and $$c = 8$$.

steps.title: Solve for b
steps.content:
• Set coefficient to zero: $$b-2 = 0$$ → $$b = 2$$.
  • Check constant: $$8 \neq 0$$ (true), so the equation has no solution when $$b = 2$$.
  • That matches Choice A — 2.
